description_long: This is a square throw pillow with a white fabric cover featuring a simple black grid pattern. The pillow appears plush and slightly overstuffed, giving it a soft, inviting look. In the upper left corner, there is a dark, stylized brand logo with white text, adding a touch of modern branding. The grid lines are evenly spaced, creating a geometric and minimalist aesthetic. The surface of the pillow is smooth and matte, with no visible stains or signs of wear. The pillow is shown isolated against a plain background, with no additional context or surrounding objects.
description: A white square pillow with a black grid pattern and a dark brand logo in the corner, featuring a soft, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full grid pattern and the brand logo in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the pointed edges, with the logo partially visible at the top.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the grid pattern and the brand logo in the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pillow's thickness and the brand logo at the top, similar to view 1.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark, stylized logo with white text is visible in the upper left corner on the front and upper right on the back.
